summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ultimate Deployment Dashboard. All major features and navigation tested successfully. UI is fully functional with excellent user experience.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with KPI cards showing stats (4 cards: Total Media, Skool Lessons, Pinterest B-Roll, Active Jobs)
Skool Downloader: classroom URL input and Loom URL input work correctly
Skool Downloader: Scrape Videos button is functional and enabled
Skool Downloader: Download Selected button is functional and enabled
Pinterest Downloader: URL input and check button work correctly
Pinterest Downloader: download button is functional
Pinterest Downloader: trend-based B-roll keyword search input works
Content Library: page loads with grid/list view toggle functional
Content Library: source filter dropdown works correctly
Instagram Management: add account form works and opens correctly
Instagram Management: DM automation rules tab accessible and add rule form works
Trend Analyser: URL input works and Analyse button is enabled
Prompt Creator: create new prompt form works, content textarea functional
Kanban Planner: board shows 3 columns (To Do, In Progress, Done), can add cards
Add Side Hustle (Module Builder): create module form works with name input
Settings: API keys vault - add key form works correctly
Sidebar navigation: all tabs navigate correctly between all pages
Download jobs list shows correctly on dashboard (empty state displayed properly)
All forms and inputs are responsive and functional
UI components render correctly with proper styling
No JavaScript errors or console errors detected
Application loads quickly and navigation is smooth
